SELECT YYYYMMDDToDate(yyyymmdd) AS date_result FROM test_dates;
SELECT YYYYMMDDToDate(20230911) AS date_result, YYYYMMDDToDate(20220229) AS leap_year_date_result;
SELECT YYYYMMDDToDate(yyyymmdd) FROM test_dates WHERE yyyymmdd BETWEEN 20220101 AND 20221231;

SELECT d1.date_result, d2.date_result FROM (SELECT YYYYMMDDToDate(yyyymmdd) AS date_result FROM test_dates) AS d1 JOIN (SELECT YYYYMMDDToDate(20230911) AS date_result) AS d2 ON d1.date_result < d2.date_result;
CREATE TABLE valid_dates AS SELECT YYYYMMDDToDate(yyyymmdd) AS valid_date FROM test_dates WHERE yyyymmdd BETWEEN 20000101 AND 20221231;
CREATE TABLE invalid_dates AS SELECT YYYYMMDDToDate(yyyymmdd) AS invalid_date FROM test_dates WHERE yyyymmdd NOT BETWEEN 20000101 AND 20221231;
